content: The inherent working memory capacity limits that constrain agent reasoning can be turned into an adaptive active learning regularization signal: curiosity-driven exploration is only triggered to encode new episodic memory traces when the agent’s existing working memory fails to compress the current reasoning context. This creates a self-regulating memory system that prioritizes SOTA active learning efficiency by only storing high-value new memories that actually improve future reasoning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
